name: Handheld Plush Rattle Baby Toy - Bear - Cloud Island™
description:
Promote learning through play with this Handheld Plush Rattle Baby Toy from Cloud Island™. Made from polyester, this BPA-free rattle toy is designed with a cute bear head and features a scalloped handle with embossed designs to help enhance their fine motor skills. Suitable for newborns and up, this handheld soft toy is adorned with apple and heart charms that can help improve hand-eye coordination.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
